name: Entrance Sounder
description: Streamer will add a customized sound to play after your first chat message in a stream. Limit one per viewer.

name: Happy Hour
description: Time & event pixel rewards are doubled for one hour

name: Happy Hour Stream
description: Time & event pixel rewards are doubled for the rest of stream

name: Paper Beast
description: Time & event pixel rewards are doubled for the rest of stream

name: Potato Stream
description: Streamer does a full stream in a potato costume

name: Retropolis 2
description: A full playthrough of Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye

name: Stop, Drop, & Rogue
description: Streamer has to stop current gameplay and do one run of a VR roguelite

name: Top Ten List
description: Give a topic for me to make a top 10 list for. Anything offensive will be rejected

name: Golf Night
description: Sponsor a night of Walkabout Mini Golf with the community

name: Pixel Giveaway
description: Sponsor a onetime giveaway of 4,000 for chat!

name: VRChat World Hop
description: Spend the night exploring worlds in VRChat

name: Custom Command
description: Add a new command to the channel (subject to approval; limit one per person)

name: Charitable Donation
description: Gift 1,000 pixels to any viewer of your choosing

name: Switch It Up
description: Add a Nintendo Switch 2 stream to the schedule

name: Make It Rain
description: Gift 250 pixels to everyone currently in chat
